LanguageData.ZoologySlaughterDesignationAdded: You've marked {0} for slaughter—it may react with aggression!
LanguageData.ZoologySensesSlaughterIntent: {0} senses killing intent and begins to attack viciously!
LanguageData.LetterPredatorProtectingPrey: {PREDATOR} is protecting its prey and is attacking {PREY}.
LanguageData.LetterPredatorProtectingPreyPack: {0} are protecting their prey and are attacking {1}.
LanguageData.LetterAnimalProtectingEggs: {PARENT} is protecting its clutch and is attacking {PREY}.
LanguageData.LetterAnimalProtectingEggsPack: {0} are protecting a clutch and are attacking {1}.
LanguageData.LetterMotherProtectingYoung: {PARENT} is protecting its young and is attacking {ATTACKER}.
LanguageData.LetterMotherProtectingYoungPack: {0} are protecting their young and are attacking {1}.
LanguageData.ZoologyCannotDraftDuringRitual: Animals cannot be drafted during rituals.
LanguageData.Zoology_ResetMessage: Settings have been reset to defaults.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnablePreyFleeing_Desc: Animals will try to flee from nearby predators.
LanguageData.Zoology_FleeDistanceTargetPredator_Label: Flee distance from target predator: {0} (min {1}, max {2})
LanguageData.Zoology_AnimalsFlee_NonHostile_Desc: Animals will also flee from predators that are not currently hostile.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnablePackHunt_Desc: Predators may hunt in packs when appropriate.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAdvancedPredation_Desc: Use more advanced logic for predator behavior.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableScavengering_Desc: Animals with scavenging behavior may feed on corpses.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnablePredatorDefendCorpse_Desc: Predators may defend corpses they are feeding on.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnablePredatorDefendFromHumans_L: Allow predators to defend prey from humans and mechanoids
LanguageData.Zoology_EnablePredatorDefendFromHumans_D: Predators may attack humans or mechanoids that threaten their prey.
LanguageData.Zoology_MinCombatPowerDefend_Label: Minimum combat power to defend prey: {0} (min {1}, max {2})
LanguageData.Zoology_AllowSlaughterLactating_Desc: Allows animals that are currently lactating to be marked for slaughter.
LanguageData.Zoology_LactationDisabled_Note: Lactation is disabled, so this option is unavailable.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAnimalChildcare_Desc: Enable animals protecting and caring for their young.
LanguageData.Zoology_MinCombatPowerDefendYoung_Label: Minimum combat power to defend young and clutches from humans/mechanoids: {0} (min {1}, max {2})
LanguageData.Zoology_PreventFleeFromHumansWhileProtec: Do not flee from humans while protecting young
Animals strong enough to defend their young from humans and mechanoids will not flee while they have protectable young.
Do not flee from humans while protecting clutches
Animals strong enough to defend their clutch from humans and mechanoids will not flee while they have a protectable clutch.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAnimalEggProtection_Desc: Enable animals defending their eggs and clutch.
LanguageData.Zoology_DevHatchNow_Desc: Instantly completes the hatch timer for this egg.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAnimalWoundLicking_Desc: Enable animals licking wounds to help with recovery.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableEctothermic_Desc: Apply special behavior adjustments for ectothermic animals.
LanguageData.Zoology_OverrideCEPenetration_Desc: Override Combat Extended penetration settings for this mod.
LanguageData.Zoology_CENotAvailable: Combat Extended features are not available in this setup.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAnimalDraftControl_Desc: Allow animals to be drafted manually.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableCustomFleeDanger_Desc: Use custom thresholds for fleeing behavior.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableIgnoreSmallPets_Desc: Raider AI may ignore very small animals.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableSmallPetNoMelee_Label: Small pets do not retaliate in melee
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableSmallPetNoMelee_Desc: Very small pets will not use melee retaliation.
LanguageData.Zoology_AnimalsFreeFromHumans_Desc: Animals may flee from humans based on their settings.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableWildAnimalReproduction_Des: Wild animals may reproduce according to this mod's rules.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableHumanBionicOnAnimal_Desc: Allow human bionics to be installed on animals where supported.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAgroAtSlaughter_Desc: Animals may become aggressive when marked for slaughter.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableCannotBeMutated_Desc: Protect applicable animals from mutation effects.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableCannotBeAugmented_Desc: Protect applicable animals from augmentation effects.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableNoFlee_Desc: Apply the no-flee extension to applicable animals.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableFleeFromCarrier_Desc: Animals may flee from the carrier of a threat.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableFlyingFleeStart_Desc: Flying animals may begin fleeing sooner.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableGenderRestrictedAttacks_De: Some attacks may be limited by gender.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableCannotChew_Desc: Apply the cannot-chew extension where supported.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableAgeless_Desc: Apply the ageless component to applicable animals.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableDrugsImmune_Desc: Apply the drugs-immune component to applicable animals.
LanguageData.Zoology_EnableNoPorcupineQuill_Desc: Prevent porcupine quills from being applied where supported.
LanguageData.Zoology_MasterSwitchNote: These switches affect runtime patches and may require a reload.
LanguageData.Zoology_ReloadWarning: Some changes may require reloading the game.
LanguageData.Zoology_AllowSlaughterLactating_Desc: Allows animals that are lactating to be marked for slaughter.
